task_name: Add GitHub OAuth Provider to T3 Stack App

plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Here's the complete implementation plan

After thoroughly exploring the codebase, here's what I found and what needs to change:

---

### Key Discovery
This is the **`create-t3-app` CLI repo** — the "application" lives in the `template/` folder. The Prisma schema (`auth-schema.prisma`) already has the correct Account/Session/User/VerificationToken models — they're provider-agnostic. The tRPC context already passes session data through `getServerSession` — no changes needed there either.

---

### 5 Files to Modify

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `template/addons/next-auth/api-handler.ts` | `DiscordProvider` → `GitHubProvider`; env vars `DISCORD_*` → `GITHUB_*` |
| `template/addons/next-auth/api-handler-prisma.ts` | Same swap (Prisma-variant) |
| `template/addons/env/auth-schema.mjs` | `DISCORD_CLIENT_ID/SECRET` → `GITHUB_CLIENT_ID/SECRET` in zod schema |
| `template/addons/env/auth-prisma-schema.mjs` | Same swap |
| `template/base/.env-example` | Update comment and placeholder var names |
| `template/page-studs/index/with-auth-trpc-tw.tsx` | Import & use `<GitHubSignInButton />` instead of generic button |

### 2 Files to Create

| File | Contents |
|---|---|
| `template/addons/next-auth/github-sign-in-button.tsx` | Reusable button with inline GitHub SVG icon + Tailwind + `signIn("github")` |
| `template/page-studs/profile.tsx` | Profile page showing avatar (`user.image`) + name (`user.name`) + email, uses `trpc.useQuery(["auth.getSession"])` to demonstrate session passthrough, redirects unauthenticated users home |

### Nothing to Change
- `template/addons/prisma/auth-schema.prisma` — already generic (Account model uses `provider`/`providerAccountId` fields)
- `template/addons/trpc/auth-prisma-context.ts` — `getServerSession` is already provider-agnostic
- `template/addons/next-auth/next-auth.d.ts` — `DefaultSession["user"]` already includes `name`, `email`, `image` (avatar)
